5.11.80.en: Updated OAuth flow to use session token for authorization. 145 drivers and 3093 fingerprints supported.

5.11.79.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.79 adds headless OAuth support and updates drivers and fingerprints.

5.11.78.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.78: Fixed session API v2 and updated auto-publish process.

5.11.77.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.77: Added session API fallback, updated drivers and fingerprints.

5.11.76.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.76: Fixed auto-promote failure handling and updated drivers.

5.11.75.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.75 adds filtered search for IMAP emails and updates drivers and fingerprints.

5.11.74.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.74: Fixed IMAP fetch issue, updated drivers and fingerprints.

5.11.73.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.73: Fixed IMAP fetch issue and updated fingerprints.

5.11.72.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.72: Fixed IMAP fetch issue and updated drivers and fingerprints.

5.11.71.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.71: Improved error logging for IMAP and updated diagnostics.

5.11.70.en: Fixed IMAP credential handling and updated app with 145 drivers and 3093 fingerprints.

5.11.69.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.69 adds a fallback for Gmail IMAP authentication and updates several workflows.

5.11.68.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.68: Added IMAP fallback for keepalive alerts and updated 145 drivers with 3093 fingerprints.

5.11.67.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.67: Added fallback for Gmail address, auto-published 145 drivers with 3093 fingerprints.

5.11.66.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.66 adds IMAP fallback for Gmail diagnostics and updates diagnostics scripts.

5.11.65.en: Fixed driver assignment for _TZE200_vvmbj46n and updated app to v5.11.65 with 145 drivers and 3093 fingerprints.

5.11.64.en: Fixed driver issues for _TZE200_pay2byax and improved data sanitization.

5.11.63.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.63 fixes flow card titles and adds missing icons for IR capabilities.

5.11.62.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.62: Added missing IR icon, fixed validation for remote dimmer and IR remote.

5.11.61.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.61 fixes validation issues for remote dimmer and IR remote drivers.

5.11.81.en: v5.11.80: Fixed OAuth flow to use session token for the authorization step, ensuring proper handling of the OAuth process., Added support for 145 drivers and 3093 fingerprints in this release., Auto-publish feature updated to reflect the new driver and fingerprint counts., Updated scripts for auto-promotion of OAuth changes.
